config.title: Kreator wysyłki (krok 1) #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "50209" #include "50200"
function fopen : fopen = true trans_.var(APPVAR_GIVEN_TYPEIDS) = "TYPEID_N5KLIENT;TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK;TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK" end function
WVB_FILTER_RADIO(CTRL_RADIO_NAME,container().m_nDest,container().m_nDest,container().m_nIdObj) WVB_FILTER_CHOICELIST(container().m_nTypeID,container().m_nTypeId,container().m_nIdObj,container().m_strName) WVB_FILTER_CHOICESEARCHTYPE(container().m_nTypeID,container().m_nTypeId,container().m_nIdObj,container().m_strName) WVB_FILTER_GETTEXT(2,CTRL_LIST_NAME,container().m_nDest,container().m_nIdobj,container().m_strName) WVB_FILTER_GETTEXT(3,CTRL_RAPORT_NAME,container().m_nDest,container().m_nIdobj,container().m_strName)
function is_empty if container().m_nIdObj=0 then if container().m_nDest<>1 then is_empty = true else is_empty = false end if else is_empty = false end if end function
function c##CTRL_RADIO_TYPEID##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl):c##CTRL_RADIO_TYPEID##_ongetdata=false select case container().m_nTypeID case TYPEID_N5KLIENT: oCtrl.value = clng(1) case TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK: oCtrl.value = clng(2) case TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK: oCtrl.value = clng(3) case else oCtrl.value = clng(1) end select end function
function c##CTRL_RADIO_TYPEID##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue):c##CTRL_RADIO_TYPEID##_ondataentered=false select case oCtrl.value case 1: container().m_nTypeID = TYPEID_N5KLIENT case 2: container().m_nTypeID = TYPEID_N5KLIENT_PRACOWNIK case 3: container().m_nTypeID = TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK end select container().m_nIdObj = 0 c##CTRL_RADIO_TYPEID##_ondataentered=true end function

page.body:
XFORMMWIZZARDBEGIN(PICTURE_WIZZARD_WYSYLKA_STEP1)
Wybierz rodzaj adresatów
Klienci Pracownicy klienta Nasi pracownicy
Wybierz których adresatów, ma dotyczyć działanie kreatora
WX_FILTER_BEGIN(CTRL_RADIO_NAME) WX_FILTER_ITEM_FIXED(Wszyscy aktywni) WX_FILTER_ITEM_CHOICELIST(Lista wyboru,CTRL_LIST_NAME) WX_FILTER_ITEM_SEARCHTYPE(Wynik wyszukiwania,CTRL_RAPORT_NAME) WX_FILTER_END
XFORMMWIZZARDEND
